comment: оставляем на Сантиэле по любой причине

languages.text: "Н-неужели нас отправят наверх, добывать прометий? Да я лучше сдохну..."

traits.locale_text: "Н-неужели нас отправят наверх, добывать прометиум? Да я лучше сдохну..."
"Н-неужели нас отправят наверх, добывать прометий? Да я лучше сдохну..."

languages.text: "W-will they really send us up there to extract promethium? I would rather die here and now..."
languages.original_text: "Н-неужели нас отправят наверх, добывать прометий? Да я лучше сдохну..."

traits.locale_text: "W-will they really send us up there to extract promethium? I would rather die here and now..."
"W-will they really send us up there to extract promethium? I would rather die here and now..."
"W-will they really send us up there to extract promethium? I would rather die here and now..."

languages.text: "Werden sie uns wirklich da hochschicken, um Promethium zu gewinnen? Ich würde lieber hier und jetzt sterben..."
languages.original_text: "W-will they really send us up there to extract promethium? I would rather die here and now..."

languages.text: "Vont-ils vraiment nous envoyer là-haut pour extraire du prométhium ? Je préfère mourir ici et maintenant..."
languages.original_text: "W-will they really send us up there to extract promethium? I would rather die here and now..."

languages.text: "他们真的会把我们送上去提取钷吗？我宁愿现在就死在这里......"
languages.original_text: "W-will they really send us up there to extract promethium? I would rather die here and now..."

languages.text: "¿Realmente nos enviarán allí a extraer prometio? Preferiría morir aquí y ahora..."
languages.original_text: "W-will they really send us up there to extract promethium? I would rather die here and now..."

languages.text: 「プロメチウムを抽出するために、本当に私たちを送り込むのだろうか？今ここで死んだほうがましだ......"
languages.original_text: "W-will they really send us up there to extract promethium? I would rather die here and now..."

languages.text: "Bizi gerçekten prometyum çıkarmak için oraya gönderecekler mi? Burada ve şimdi ölmeyi tercih ederim..."
languages.original_text: "W-will they really send us up there to extract promethium? I would rather die here and now..."
